seeded_from: prod_ext150 (150-ep extension of grid winner lr1e-3/wd1e-5, FPC-const) + arm-2/arm-A T6 curves + cape_base_100ep
note: thresholds are on the piff trainer stdout grammar '[ep NNN] ... val NLL x RMSE x R2 x sigma x zeta_ls x ...'

triggers.explode: any non-finite val NLL/RMSE/R2 in the log line
triggers.collapse: val R2 < 0.02 for 10 consecutive epochs after ep 5 (arm C/D signature: constant-mean prediction)
triggers.planb: literal 'PLAN-B SYMPTOM' in any line (feature collapse >10x)
triggers.conditioning_inert: zeta_ls within 1e-4 of 0.6931 at every epoch >= 30 (P1 falsifier; FLAG not kill)
triggers.nll_runaway: val NLL > running_min + 0.5 for 10 consecutive epochs (instability; report, human decides)

kill_policy: monitor NEVER qdels; it emails verdicts. I14 qdel remains a supervisor action on evidence.

cape_deltas.note: cape NLL scale ~6.3-6.6 healthy (y_sd 281 vs 87); add this shift to every max_nll above when run-name contains 'cape'
